headline: Private credit risks more deep-seated than headlines suggest: Investor
summary: Robert Dafforn, Chief Investment Officer at Polus Capital Management, tells CNBC’s Ritika Gupta that significant risks in private credit have been building for years, well before the sector came under broader scrutiny. He warns that continued outflows and investor redemptions could ultimately cause capital to dry up across the market.

headline: Wall Street banks start trading derivatives to bet on pain in private credit
